Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Archlord]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Archlord is a rank or level of item/person above Overlord.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Archlords are the most advanced subjects in the library.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — An Archlord's memories are difficult for those not advanced enough to tolerate.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The mission would be suicidal if they had an Archlord.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Archlords conduct mental tests including reaction speed, memory, force of will, and resistance to incursion.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The black dragon is deduced to be equivalent to an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — An Archlord is a level of power or entity type.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Archlords are more powerful than Gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The nature of Heralds, Sages, and Monarchs is a secret for anyone below Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Failure in advancement could leave Sophara unable to ever advance to Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel reached Archlord at a young age.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Archlords are not eligible for the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — A solid foundation must be built until the Archlord stage before developing authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Advancing through Archlord can be astronomically expensive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — The Winter Sage can sense the Sword Icon before an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Archlord is a stage of power that Mercy aims to reach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Archlord requires meditating on the future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — An Archlord's shield is worthy of elaborate designs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The echo Forger technique shows its true power when used by a real Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Archlords were rare and none were close to the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — It is rare to have a stable connection to the Sword Icon before reaching Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — At the peak of Archlord, the differences between sacred artists and sacred beasts disappear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Stable authority is rarely developed before the Archlord stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Archlords might not interfere with one Underlord running around while in their grip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — To become a true Herald, one must advance to the peak of Archlord in the traditional way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Archlords gather Golds in front of a tall, scripted stone during emergencies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan's Archlord power covered the entire tower.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Some Archlords can leave Cradle by their own power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin's instability might be because she did not hit Archlord first.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan is an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Archlord is a title used for Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan strengthened his Archlord body with soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Advancing to Archlord would solve Dross's problems.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — A memory shows a group of three Archlords who betrayed each other after finding treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Advancing to Archlord requires insight into one's future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan mentions needing to speak with the Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin has not yet advanced to the Archlord stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Archlords produce the highest form of soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The Archlord is a rank or entity mentioned by Eithan.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The gemstones carried an Archlord's focused will and practiced madra control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Archlord is a blue-crystal entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Archlord is covered in angular blue crystal and has a pyramid over his head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Archlord is an Everwood Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Archlord is a stage of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel was an Archlord but not a peak Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon has advanced to the rank of Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — An Archlord is a member of the nobility among dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Archlords are positioned near Redmoon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — An Archlord tested Moongrave's boundary field by hurling fifty trees at the walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Archlord is Helethshan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Archlords joined together to engage affected Lords and Ladies at their level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Archlord advancement involves deciding who one wants to be.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Archlords of Moongrave can focus attacks on a target.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Archlords were present in Mercy's office.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Archlord is an advancement level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel expects to reach the peak of Archlord soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — At peak Archlord, one can sense Icons more clearly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — The Path of Seven Pages leads to the peak of Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Archlords are powerful figures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Charity gives orders to her Archlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Advancement to Archlord is decided by the individual, not the heavens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — The Archlord carries a massive sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Archlords can have black eyes with circles of bright red or blue eyes with circles of white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — An Archlord kneels before Northstrider.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Archlord is a level of strength that the Mist Sage possesses at her base.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
